title: 10 best herbal teas for rheumatoid arthritis
intro_desc: Herbal teas for rheumatoid arthritis are plant-based infusions that help alleviate symptoms and manage the condition by reducing inflammation, improving joint mobility, and promoting relaxation. The best herbal teas for rheumatoid arthritis include Curcuma longa, Zingiber officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Achillea millefolium, Camellia sinensis, Urtica dioica, Rheum palmatum, Equisetum arvense, Cinchona officinalis, and Ginkgo biloba. If left untreated, rheumatoid arthritis can lead to chronic pain, limited mobility, and fatigue, severely impacting daily life, relationships, and overall well-being.
